input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.5.6.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.5.6.3
            TITLE: the tractive system must contain a discharge circuit. the discharge circuit must be:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.5.6.3: The Tractive System must contain a Discharge Circuit. The Discharge Circuit must be:
EV.5.6.3 The Tractive System must contain a Discharge Circuit. The Discharge Circuit must be: 
a. Wired in a way that it is always active when the Shutdown Circuit is open 
b. Able to discharge the Intermediate Circuit capacitors if the HVD has been opened  
c. Not be fused 
d. Designed to handle the maximum Tractive System voltage for minimum 15 seconds

final_answer: rule EV.5.6.3: The Tractive System must contain a Discharge Circuit. The Discharge Circuit must be: EV.5.6.3 The Tractive System must contain a Discharge Circuit. The Discharge Circuit must be: a. Wired in a way that it is always active when the Shutdown Circuit is open b. Able to discharge the Intermediate Circuit capacitors if the HVD has been opened c. Not be fused d. Designed to handle the maximum Tractive System voltage for minimum 15 seconds
